subject: [PATCH v5 05/11] mm: swap in PMD swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff

2026-07-22.patch_summary: This patch improves the handling of PMD-level swap entries during swapoff by allowing them to be swapped in as whole THPs (Transparent Huge Pages). It introduces a new function, `swap_pmd_cache_lookup`, which classifies the swap cache behind a PMD swap entry as empty, backed by one PMD-sized folio, or requiring per-page handling. The patch also adds functions to unuse PMD-level swap entries and split them into PTE-level entries if necessary. This change mirrors the existing behavior for PTE-level entries and preserves soft-dirty, exclusive, and UFFD (User Fault) state when installing the present PMD.
